title: Data Quality Monitoring System
description: Build a no-code data quality monitoring system with NocoBase and AI Agents to manage rules, issues, and reports.
description_cn: 通过 NocoBase 和 AI Agent 搭建无代码数据质量监控系统，统一管理规则、异常和报告。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Data Quality Monitoring System: a quality overview dashboard, rule status, an anomaly list, data freshness, quality trends, and an AI data-quality analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/31-data-quality.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 数据质量管理系统：质量总览看板、规则状态、异常列表、数据新鲜度、质量趋势和 AI 数据质量分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/31-data-quality.html
